title: Gravelmon
description: Gravelmon is a fakemon addon for the popular cobblemon mod that aims to add classic and notable fakemon to minecraft.
body:
#### Gravelmon is a mod addon for the popular Cobblemon mod that aims to bring classic, iconic or historically significant fakemon from your favorite fan-games and rom-hacks to minecraft!

Currently the mod adds 205 modeled Fakemon and 4000+ billboard Fakemon!

### Why billboard implementations?  
Having the billboard fakemon saves us time when we do get around to modeling a fakemon because we won't have to grind the Json for each fakemon as we add them. This way we can playtest the implemented fakemon, and easily add models to existing fakemon.

### I dont want any billboards in my game, is that possible too?
Yes, the library mod that we've created to support Gravelmon (Gravel's Extended Battles) adds support for ban-listing labels. By default, the "not_modeled" label is blacklisted, so billboard implementations won't show up in game. If you want to enable billboards, simply remove the "not_modeled" label from the ban-list inside of the gravelmon config. 

All of the modeled fakemon included in this pack have shinies, and custom ones where they didn't exist in their game of origin.

#### The pack is currently heavily in development, and very much incomplete. Want to help out? Feel free to hop in the discord where instructions for model submissions can be found. If you have any questions, that would also be the place to go.

### Currently features fakemon from:  
- [Pokemon Africanvs](https://x.com/pkmnafricanus?lang=en)
- [Pokemon Azure](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pokemon-azure-act-2-released.460525/)
- [Pokemon Blazing Emerald](https://pokemon-blazing-emerald.fandom.com/wiki/Pokemon_Blazing_Emerald_Wiki)
- [Pokemon Chaos in Vesita](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pok%C3%A9mon-chaos-in-vesita-new-version-out-now-eng-ger.491767/)
- [Pokemon Daybreak](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pok%C3%A9mon-daybreak.437947/)
- [Pokemon Deneb/Vega](https://pokemon-vega.fandom.com/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_Vega_Wiki)
- [Pokémon Forêt Éternelle](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pok%C3%A9mon-for%C3%AAt-%C3%89ternelle.439234/)
- [Pokemon Flux](https://pkmnflux.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page)
- [Pokemon Infinity](https://pinfinity.fandom.com/wiki/Pokemon_Infinity_Wiki)
- [Pokemon Insurgence](https://wiki.p-insurgence.com/)
- [Pokemon Azurite](https://pokengine.org/collections/102c91de/Azurite)
- [Kuulkid Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10pt9pyv/Kuulkid)
- [Lockemon](https://tofrugs-swamp.fandom.com/wiki/Lock%C3%A9mon)
- [Midamis Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10byuotj/Midamis)
- [Mikitari Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10o0ctrn/Mikitari)
- [Mongratis Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/107s7x9x/Mongratis)
- [Nodorro Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/105q17p6/Nodorro)
- [Norheim Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10togncw/Norheim)
- [Oceane Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10s2nypf/Oceane)
- [Olysos Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/103bhnos/Olysos)
- [Pokemon Opalo](https://lostiefangames.blogspot.com/p/pokemon-opalo.html)
- [Pokemon Phoenix Rising](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/phoenix-rising.425404/)
- [Pokemon Realidea System](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pok%C3%A9mon-realidea-system-now-playable-in-english.481090/)
- [Rica Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10hvquu7/Rica)
- [Pokemon Sage](https://pokemon-fan-game.fandom.com/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_Sage)
- [Pokemon Radical Red](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pok%C3%A9mon-radical-red-version-4-1-released-gen-9-dlc-pokemon-character-customization-now-available.437688/)
- [Pokemon Soulstones](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/pokemon-soulstones-postgame-released.440329/)
- [Pokemon Umbra](https://pokemonworkshop.com/en/games/pokemon-umbra)
- [Pokemon Uranium](https://pokemon-uranium.fandom.com/wiki/Main_Page)
- [Pokemon Vanguard](https://www.pokecommunity.com/threads/project-vanguard-updated-12-11-24.438886/)
- [Varitas Collection](https://pokengine.org/collections/10piq9nx/Varitas)
- [Pokemon Xenoverse](https://www.weedleteam.com/wp/)

Disclaimer:
Added fakemons are included with permission of the owner.

### Join the discord for documentation and to stay up to date with the latest developments!
https://discord.gg/yBshG9wVe8

### IMPORTANT NOTICE FOR SERVER OWNERS
You are allowed to use this mod on a server, however Gravelmon has a policy of not allowing this mod or any of its contents to be behind a paywall or for its content to be sold for any sort of real world money or currency bought with real world money. If you find a server is doing so, please report it to us and to Mojang.
